session.user:
Perform the following renames in `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/implement_shared.py`:
1. In the `TargetInfo` NamedTuple (around line 407): - Rename field `plan_number` to `pr_number` - Update docstring: `"plan_number"` → `"pr_number"`, `"plan_url"` → `"pr_url"` in the target_type description
2. In `detect_target_type()` function (around line 419): - All `plan_number=` keyword args → `pr_number=` - All `target_type="plan_number"` → `target_type="pr_number"` - All `target_type="plan_url"` → `target_type="pr_url"` - Variable `plan_number` on line 437 → rename it to `pr_number`
3. In `extract_plan_from_current_branch()` function - this operates on plan branches to extract a plan ID. Leave this function name as is because it deals with plan-as-concept, but its return value is actually a plan_id (PR identifier). Leave unchanged.
Do NOT rename: - Any module/file names - `PlanSource` class name or `prepare_plan_source_from_file` function name (plan-as-concept) - `strip_plan_from_filename` import
Use the Edit tool to make targeted string replacements. Read the file first.

session.assistant:
Perfect! I have successfully completed all the requested renames in `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/implement_shared.py`:
## Summary of Changes
### 1. TargetInfo NamedTuple (lines 407-416) - **Field renamed**: `plan_number` → `pr_number` - **Docstring updated**: - `target_type` description changed from `"plan_number", "plan_url"` to `"pr_number", "pr_url"` - Attribute description changed from `plan_number: Extracted plan number` to `pr_number: Extracted PR number`
### 2. detect_target_type() function (lines 419-444) - **Line 430**: `plan_number=` → `pr_number=` - **Line 430**: `target_type="plan_number"` → `target_type="pr_number"` - **Line 436**: Variable `plan_number` → `pr_number` - **Line 437**: `target_type="plan_url"` → `target_type="pr_url"`, `plan_number=` → `pr_number=` - **Line 441**: `plan_number=` → `pr_number=` - **Line 441**: `target_type="plan_number"` → `target_type="pr_number"` - **Line 444**: `plan_number=` → `pr_number=`
### 3. Functions NOT renamed (as requested) - `extract_plan_from_current_branch()` - kept as-is (deals with plan-as-concept) - `PlanSource` class name - kept as-is - `prepare_plan_source_from_file()` function name - kept as-is - `strip_plan_from_filename` import - kept as-is
All changes have been applied successfully. The renames reflect the shift from "plan" terminology (in the GitHub issues sense) to "PR" terminology while preserving the semantic use of "plan" for the concept of implementation plans.
